news.paragraph: Gold prices have recently faced downward pressure as a surge in U.S. inflation has driven up both the dollar and bond yields. While silver has seen recent surges, gold has remained relatively stable or traded lower in response to these macroeconomic shifts. Traders should monitor how ongoing inflation data continues to influence the metal's price action.
headlines: Gold and silver prices today, Wednesday, May 13: Silver prices surge again, gold sits tight
